Description.en: Modifies a [Corrupted] [Equipment] or [Jewel] item unpredictably or destroys it
Description.zh: 随机修改一件[Corrupted|已腐化][Equipment|装备]或[Jewel|珠宝]，或将其摧毁

Description.en: Modifies a [Corrupted] Skill Gem unpredictably or destroys it
Description.zh: 随机修改一颗[Corrupted|已腐化]技能宝石，或将其摧毁

Description.en: Modifies a [SoulCore|Soul Core] unpredictably, with a chance to destroy it
Description.zh: 随机修改一个[SoulCore|灵核]，有几率将其摧毁

Description.en: Modifies a [Tablet|Tablet] unpredictably
Description.zh: 随机修改一块[Tablet|石板]

Description.en:
Replaces up to 2 modifiers on a [Corrupted] [UniqueCulture|Vaal Unique]
Replaces other [ItemRarity|Uniques] with a Corrupted Unique of the same Item Class
Description.zh:
最多替换[Corrupted|已腐化][UniqueCulture|瓦尔传奇物品]上的 2 个词缀
同物品类别的腐化传奇物品替换其他[ItemRarity|传奇]物品

Description.en: Greatly improves the [Quality|quality] of a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon], [CasterWeapon|Caster Weapon] or [EquipArmour|Armour]
Description.zh: 大幅提升一件[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]、[CasterWeapon|施法武器]或[EquipArmour|护甲]的[Quality|品质]

Description.en: Adds an [Augment] Socket to a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon], wand, staff or Armour
Description.zh: 为一件[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]、法杖、长杖或护甲添加一个[Augment|增幅器]插槽。

Description.en:
Improves the [Quality|quality] of an [Armour],
exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of [Corrupted|Corrupting] it
Description.zh:
提高一件[Armour|护甲]的[Quality|品质]，
可超出最大品质最多 10%，并有几率使其[Corrupted|腐化]

Description.en:
Improves the [Quality|quality] of a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon],
exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of [Corrupted|Corrupting] it
Description.zh:
提高一件[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]的[Quality|品质]，
可超出最大品质最多 10%，并有几率使其[Corrupted|腐化]

Description.en:
Improves the [Quality|quality] of a wand, staff or sceptre,
exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of [Corrupted|Corrupting] it
Description.zh:
提高魔杖、长杖或权杖的[Quality|品质]，
可超出最大品质最多 10%，并有几率使其[Corrupted|腐化]

Description.en:
Improves the [Quality|quality] of a ring or amulet,
exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of [Corrupted|Corrupting] it
Description.zh:
提高戒指或项链的[Quality|品质]，
可超出最大品质最多 10%，并有几率使其[Corrupted|腐化]

entries.id: Weapon or Armour Quality High Multiple

Description.en: Improves the [Quality|quality] of a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon], [CasterWeapon|Caster Weapon] or [EquipArmour|Armour] above 20% with a chance of [Corrupted|Corrupting] it
Description.zh: 将一件[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]、[CasterWeapon|施法武器]或[EquipArmour|护甲]的[Quality|品质]提升 20% 以上，并有几率[Corrupted|腐化]该物品

Description.en: Destroys an [Equipment] item, returning any [Augment|Augments] socketed in it
Description.zh: 摧毁一件[Equipment|装备]物品，并返还其中镶嵌的所有[Augment|增幅器]

Description.en: Sets a Skill Gem to have 3 Support Gem Sockets
Description.zh: 使一个技能宝石拥有 3 个辅助宝石插槽

Description.en: Greatly improves the [Quality|quality] of a Skill Gem
Description.zh: 大幅提升技能宝石的[Quality|品质]

Description.en: Modifies an item unpredictably and [Corrupted|Corrupts] it
Description.zh: 随机修改一件物品，并[Corrupted|腐化]它

Description.en: Modifies an item unpredictably and [Corrupted|Corrupts] it
Description.zh: 随机修改一件物品，并[Corrupted|腐化]它

Description.en: Augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] [Equipment] item with a new random modifier
Description.zh: 使用一个新的随机词缀强化一件[ItemRarity|稀有][Equipment|装备]物品。

Description.en: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Magic] [Equipment] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item, adding 1 modifier
Description.zh: 将一件[ItemRarity|魔法][Equipment|装备]物品升级为[ItemRarity|稀有]物品，并增加 1 个词缀。

Description.en: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Normal] or [ItemRarity|Magic] [Equipment] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with 4 random modifiers
Description.zh: 将一件[ItemRarity|普通]或[ItemRarity|魔法][Equipment|装备]物品升级为一件拥有 4 个随机词缀的[ItemRarity|稀有]物品。

Description.en: Augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new random modifier
Description.zh: 用一个新随机词缀强化一件[ItemRarity|稀有]物品

Description.en: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item, adding 1 modifier
Description.zh: 将一件[ItemRarity|魔法]物品升级为[ItemRarity|稀有]物品，并增加 1 个词缀

Description.en: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Normal] or [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with 4 random modifiers
Description.zh: 将一件[ItemRarity|普通]或[ItemRarity|魔法]物品升级为拥有 4 个词缀的[ItemRarity|稀有]物品
